MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Aug-01-2025 Continued To Aug-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Anthony Daher, Esq. of Wade Litigation, APC (tel: 408-842-1688) for Plaintiff David Flaherty.
Atty. Tanner Camp, Esq. of Foley & Lardner LLP (tel: 801-401-8900) for Defendants Sepio Capital, LLC and Sepio Capital, LP.
Atty. Gabriel Lee Sanchez, Esq. of Keesal, Young & Logan (tel: 415-398-6000) for Defendant Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC.
Atty. Matthew Houghton, Esq. of Reed Smith LLP (tel: 415-543-8700) for Defendant BNY Mellon Investment Servicing Trust Company.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS SEPIO CAPITAL, LLC, AND SEPIO CAPITAL, LP's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Matter argued. Upon conclusion, the Court continues the matter to allow the parties to submit further briefing on Massachusetts law. Plaintiff's supplemental brief is due on August 7, 2025. Defendants' supplemental brief is due on August 14, 2025. Briefs must not exceed 5 pages. The Court continues the matter to August 28, 2025 at 9:00 A.M. in department 301.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
